'''thayudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oolith|oolith]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oolith|oolith]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thayudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæyidhith|thæyidhith]] || [[word:thæyidhij|thæyidhij]] || [[word:thæyidhish|thæyidhish]] || [[word:thæyidhi|thæyidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayuyudhuth|thayuyudhuth]] || [[word:thayuyudhuj|thayuyudhuj]] || [[word:thayuyudhush|thayuyudhush]] || [[word:thayuyudhu|thayuyudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayudhuth|thayudhuth]] || [[word:thayudhuj|thayudhuj]] || [[word:thayudhush|thayudhush]] || [[word:thayudhu|thayudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayufdhuth|thayufdhuth]] || [[word:thayufdhuj|thayufdhuj]] || [[word:thayufdhush|thayufdhush]] || [[word:thayufdhuf|thayufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thayudhuthu|thayudhuthu]] || [[word:thayudhuju|thayudhuju]] || [[word:thayudhushu|thayudhushu]] || [[word:thayudhuku|thayudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thayudhuth|thayudhuth]] || [[word:thayudhuj|thayudhuj]] || [[word:thayudhush|thayudhush]] || [[word:thayudhu|thayudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thayudhuthul|thayudhuthul]] || [[word:thayudhujul|thayudhujul]] || [[word:thayudhushul|thayudhushul]] || [[word:thayudhukul|thayudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thayudhuthuthu|thayudhuthuthu]] || [[word:thayudhujuju|thayudhujuju]] || [[word:thayudhushushu|thayudhushushu]] || [[word:thayudhuku|thayudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thayudhuthun|thayudhuthun]] || [[word:thayudhujun|thayudhujun]] || [[word:thayudhushun|thayudhushun]] || [[word:thayudhukun|thayudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thayudhuthuoro|thayudhuthuoro]] || [[word:thayudhujuoro|thayudhujuoro]] || [[word:thayudhushuoro|thayudhushuoro]] || [[word:thayudhukuoro|thayudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
